title: Mobile app version is changed
scenario: Mobile app version is not correctly reflected on Lens tenant pages (Device user, Inventory, Mobile profile, Device profile) after app upgrade
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Navigate to Home → Account → App Version and note the current app version.
3. Upgrade the Poly Studio Mobile app to the latest version via the app store or sideload.
4. Launch the upgraded Poly Studio Mobile app and log in with Lens tenant credentials.
5. Navigate to Home → Account → App Version and confirm the new version is displayed.
6. On the Lens tenant web portal, go to the Device user / Mobile user page and verify the app version shown matches the new version.
7. On the Lens tenant web portal, go to the Inventory page and verify the app version shown matches the new version.
8. On the Lens tenant web portal, go to the Mobile profile page and verify the app version shown matches the new version.
9. On the Lens tenant web portal, go to the Device profile page and verify the app version shown matches the new version.
expected: The new app version is correctly reflected on the Lens tenant across the Device user/mobile user page, Inventory page, Mobile profile page, and Device profile page.
